params.name: address

schema.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

params.description: Account or contract address.

params.name: blockNumOrTag
params.description: Only the case-insensitive latest tag is supported.

params.name: address

schema.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

params.description: Account or contract address.

params.name: storageIdx

schema.description: Hex storage slot of at most 32 bytes, with or without 0x; shorter values are left-padded with zeros.

params.description: Storage slot index.

params.name: blockNumOrTag
params.description: Only the case-insensitive latest tag is supported.

methods.name: eth_call
methods.description: Method name, Java signature, parameters, return type, and declared errors are derived from java-tron source. See `docs/api/json-rpc/smart-contract/eth_call.md` for examples and detailed behavior.

params.name: transactionCall

from.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

to.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

value.description: Source-compatible non-negative hex long. null or an empty string means zero; non-empty values require a lowercase 0x prefix and must fit in signed long range.

data.description: Lenient hex calldata. null and empty values are accepted; the lowercase 0x prefix is optional and odd-length payloads are left-padded before decoding.

input.description: Strict hex calldata alias. null and an empty string are accepted; otherwise a lowercase 0x prefix and an even-length payload are required. When input is non-null, it takes precedence over data.

params.description: Transaction call arguments.

params.name: blockNumOrTag
params.description: Case-insensitive latest tag or object containing blockNumber and/or blockHash; blockNumber takes precedence.

oneOf.description: At least one selector is required. If both are present, blockNumber takes precedence; other properties are ignored.

blockNumber.description: Non-negative block number encoded as 0x-prefixed hexadecimal or decimal, limited to signed long range.

blockHash.description: 32-byte block hash, with or without the 0x prefix.

oneOf.title: EthCallParamObject2

methods.name: buildTransaction
methods.summary: Build an unsigned transaction (FullNode only; TRX transfer / TRC-10 transfer / contract deploy / contract trigger)
methods.description: Method name, Java signature, parameters, return type, and declared errors are derived from java-tron source. See `docs/api/json-rpc/tx-build/buildTransaction.md` for examples and detailed behavior.

params.name: args

from.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

to.description: Target hex address. Contract deployment also accepts an omitted value, null, an empty string, or 0x; base58check is not accepted.

gas.description: Gas limit encoded as a hex quantity.

gasPrice.description: Gas price encoded as a hex quantity.

value.description: Hex string, amount, or value field accepted by this endpoint.

data.description: Hex-encoded contract call data or transaction data.

input.description: Alias for data; when both are present they must encode the same bytes.

nonce.description: Transaction nonce encoded as a hex quantity.

consumeUserResourcePercent.description: Percentage of contract execution resource cost paid by the user.

originEnergyLimit.description: Origin energy limit for a deployed smart contract.

name.description: Name encoded as expected by java-tron.

permissionId.description: Permission id used to sign the transaction with a non-owner account permission.

extraData.description: Extra transaction data encoded as expected by java-tron.

visible.description: When true, addresses are encoded in base58check; when false or omitted, addresses are hex-encoded.

params.description: Transaction call arguments.

x-tron-rate-limiting.errorShape: JavaTronError for HTTP APIs; servlet-level error body for JSON-RPC
x-tron-rate-limiting.description: java-tron applies configurable servlet-level rate limiting. When a request is rejected by the rate limiter, RateLimiterServlet writes an error body without setting HTTP 429.

blockTimestamp.description: Block timestamp as a hex quantity in seconds.

from.description: EVM hex address using 39 or 40 digits (39 digits are left-padded), or 21-byte Tron hex address beginning with 41; base58check is not accepted.

to.description: Target hex address. Contract deployment also accepts an omitted value, null, an empty string, or 0x.

value.description: Source-compatible non-negative hex long. null or an empty string means zero; non-empty values require a lowercase 0x prefix and must fit in signed long range.

data.description: Lenient hex calldata. null and empty values are accepted; the lowercase 0x prefix is optional and odd-length payloads are left-padded before decoding.

input.description: Strict hex calldata alias. null and an empty string are accepted; otherwise a lowercase 0x prefix and an even-length payload are required. When input is non-null, it takes precedence over data.

fromBlock.description: Start block for a log filter.

toBlock.description: End block for a log filter.

address.description: Account or contract address accepted by this endpoint.

blockHash.description: 32-byte block hash, with or without the 0x prefix.
